command: ssh vps "ls -la /opt/booking-system 2>/dev/null; echo ---DOCKER---; docker ps --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}' 2>/dev/null; echo ---NGINX---; ls /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/ 2>/dev/null; echo ---NGINX-CONF---; cat /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/booking* 2>/dev/null || echo 'no booking nginx config'; echo ---PORTS---; ss -tlnp | grep -E '3000|3001|8080' 2>/dev/null"
